scripts.db:migrate: npx sequelize-cli db:migrate --config src/config/config.js --migrations-path src/migrations --models-path src/models --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.db:migrate:undo:all: npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo:all --config src/config/config.js --migrations-path src/migrations --models-path src/models --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.db:seed: npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all --config src/config/config.js --migrations-path src/migrations --models-path src/models --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.db:seed:undo:all: npx sequelize-cli db:seed:undo:all --config src/config/config.js --migrations-path src/migrations --models-path src/models --seeders-path src/seeders
